/usr/bin/ar qc ../../../../../libwindrawlib.a "CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/backend-d2d.c.o" "CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/backend-dwrite.c.o" "CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/backend-gdix.c.o" "CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/backend-wic.c.o" CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/bitblt.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/brush.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/cachedimage.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/canvas.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/draw.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/fill.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/font.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/image.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/init.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/memstream.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/misc.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/path.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/string.c.o CMakeFiles/windrawlib.dir/strokestyle.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../../../libwindrawlib.a
